solution: You can track your order via the tracking link in your shipping confirmation email or by logging into your Walmart account (on the website or app) and checking your Purchase/Order History.
Go to Purchase history > Select order > Edit items. Addresses can be updated briefly after ordering.
Orders can be cancelled within 24 hours unless shipped. Orders already on the way or from Marketplace sellers can't be changed, but you can return them after delivery.
Orders can be delayed due to demand or shipping issues. You may reschedule, switch to pickup, or get a refund if returned to store.
Orders with multiple items may arrive in separate shipments.
Walmart accepts cards, EBT, PayPal, bank payments, Walmart Balance/Cash, HSA/FSA, and gift cards. Payments can be managed in Wallet.
If you've received a damaged item, go to your order history on walmart.com, select the damaged item, and initiate a return for a refund or replacement.
